app_idea: Idle Compute Co-op: rent idle CPU-only laptops/desktops for small AI jobs (embeddings, inference, preprocessing, tiny fine-tunes), matched by hardware spec and priced fairly by a verified reliability score, with simulated crypto settlement (credit ledger) and redundant-verification trust.
backend_language: Node.js + Express + TypeScript (ESM, run via tsx)
last_successful_step: Docker Desktop 4.81.0 installed (per-user). Dockerfile, nginx config, and entrypoint.sh written; Docker build/run NOT yet verified.
current_status: Full app built and verified locally via npm dev servers end-to-end (backend API + scheduler simulation + frontend UI + /api proxy). Docker image untested — engine won't start because WSL2 isn't installed yet.
current_blocker: Docker Desktop's engine fails with 'Docker Desktop is unable to start' because WSL2 is not installed. User is running `wsl --install` in an elevated PowerShell and will restart Windows.
next_action: After the user confirms Windows has restarted: verify `docker info` succeeds, then run: docker build -t hackathon-app:local . && mkdir -p data && docker run --rm -p 9080:9080 -p 8090:8090 -v "$(pwd)/data:/app/data" hackathon-app:local — then verify http://localhost:9080 and http://localhost:9080/api/health.
